tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Band- 3 Doors Down
Song- Let Me Go
Album- Seventeen Days
Tuning- Standard

This is my first time EVER that I'm tabbing chords.

On the verses and intro you kinda slide up to the C#m on the D and G strings.
You can play around with the chord formations, but this is the jist of it.

C#m: x46600 or 446600   B: x24400 or 224400
A#: x02200 or 577600   G#m: 466x00  E: 022x00 or 779900 or 079900
F#:244x00


[Intro]

[ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
[ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]G#m[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]


[Verse]

[tab]  [ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
One more kiss could be the best thing[/tab]
One more lie could be the worst
And all these thoughts are never resting
And you're not something I deserve


[Pre-chorus]

[tab] [ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]G#m[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
In my head there's only you now[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
This world falls on me[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]G#m[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
In this world, there's real and make-believe[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]F#[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
This seems real to me[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]                    [ch]C#m[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
You love me but you don't know who I am[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]                       [ch]C#m[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
I'm torn between this life I lead and where I stand[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]C#m[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
You love me but you don't know who I am[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]G#m[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
So let me go,  Let me go[/tab]


[Instrumental]

[ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
[ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]G#m[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]


[Verse 2]

I dream ahead to what I hope for
And I turn my back on loving you
How can this love be a good thing?
I not know what I'm going through


[Pre-chorus]

In my head there's only you now
This world falls on me
In this world, there's real and make-believe
This seems real to me


[Chorus]

You love me but you don't know who I am
I'm torn between this life I lead and where I stand
You love me but you don't know who I am
So let me go
Just let me go
Let me go


[Bridge]

C#m up to E
And no matter how hard I try
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
I can't escape these things inside[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
I know, I know[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
When all the pieces fall apart[/tab]
[tab] [ch]B[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
You will be the only one who knows[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
Who knows  [/tab]


[Chorus]

You love me but you don't know who I am
I'm torn between this life I lead and where I stand
You love me but you don't know who I am
So let me go
Just let me go


[Outro]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]                       [ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
You love me but you don't   You love me but you don't[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]        
You love me but you don't know who I am[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]                   [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
You love me but you don't   You love me but you don't[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]G#m[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
You love me but you don't know me[/tab]


ENJOY!!!
